headline: Brightgate Energy equity gaps +6% as the lead-left follow-on prices at a tight 2% discount
summary: The concurrent equity tranche (SEC-3006) on our lead-left Brightgate deal priced at a 2% discount to last and traded up ~6% in the grey market on a 3x-covered book. Existing holders are marking up; expect demand for the new senior notes to follow.

headline: Brightgate 5.625% 2029 tightens 18bp after the new 6.10% 2034 tranche covers 3.4x
summary: Strong demand for the new 2034 senior note (SEC-3650) on our lead-left Brightgate deal dragged the existing 5.625% 2029 (SEC-3105) 18bp tighter on the print. Holders of the 2029 are sitting on a mark-to-market gain; natural switch into the new tranche.
